mxCell.value: Inform customer DPA has failed and end call
Select reason for call from level 1
From level 1 selection, level 2 selection is selected
Wait for customer to repeat Otac
Enter Otac from customer and click next
From level 2 selection, level 3 selection is selected
Click on subscriptions under account summary
Click on mobile number transfer Process
Steps to Triage calls (Find the correct process to use)
OTAC is the OTP used as a security pin
Complete form based on selection from drop down
The number the customer wants to keep
Get Porting date and porting time. Advise customer
Provide with port code (30 day expiry)
Payments Process if customer wants to settle
Sim Serial Number of the temp sim
Refer to Billing then Change of Details Process
Select Date of change and time
Advise customer if process is completed now, call will drop. If date and time is set for now
